Safe Browsing.description: Google Safe Browsing warns users about dangerous websites and downloads.

browser.safebrowsing.downloads.remote.en.title: Disable remote verification for downloads
browser.safebrowsing.downloads.remote.en.description: Prevents sending file info (name, origin, hash) to Google for executable verification

Telemetry.description: Disable telemetry, studies, and related data collection

datareporting.dau.cachedUsageProfileID.title: Spoof daily usage profile ID
datareporting.dau.cachedUsageProfileID.description: Replaces the stored DAU profile identifier with a fixed dummy value

datareporting.dau.cachedUsageProfileGrou.title: Spoof daily usage profile group ID
datareporting.dau.cachedUsageProfileGrou.description: Replaces the stored DAU profile group identifier with a fixed dummy value

toolkit.telemetry.server.title: Block telemetry endpoint
toolkit.telemetry.server.description: Uses the data: URI scheme so accidental telemetry posts have no real network destination

toolkit.telemetry.cachedClientID.title: Spoof telemetry client ID
toolkit.telemetry.cachedClientID.description: Replaces the stored client ID with a fixed dummy value

telemetry.fog.test.localhost_port.title: Force telemetry to invalid port
telemetry.fog.test.localhost_port.description: Fallback Glean traffic is redirected to an invalid localhost port

telemetry.fog.artifact_build.title: Disable artifact-build telemetry registration
telemetry.fog.artifact_build.description: Prevents JOG-style runtime metric registration in artifact-style configurations

captchadetection.actor.enabled.title: Disable CAPTCHA detection pings
captchadetection.actor.enabled.description: Prevents CAPTCHA detection measurements from being collected

network.traffic_analyzer.enabled.title: Disable network traffic analyzer
network.traffic_analyzer.enabled.description: Prevents the internal traffic analyzer from collecting extra network diagnostics

browser.safebrowsing.features.emailtrack.title: Disable Safe Browsing email-tracking data updates

toolkit.telemetry.bhrPing.enabled.title: Disable background hang report ping
toolkit.telemetry.bhrPing.enabled.description: Prevents background hang reports from being sent

toolkit.telemetry.newProfilePing.delay.title: Disable new profile ping delay scheduling

toolkit.telemetry.log.level.title: Restrict telemetry logging to fatal level

toolkit.telemetry.overrideUpdateChannel.title: Normalize telemetry update channel
toolkit.telemetry.overrideUpdateChannel.description: Always reports the release channel to reduce telemetry variability

telemetry.glean.internal.maxPingsPerMinu.title: Block all Glean pings
telemetry.glean.internal.maxPingsPerMinu.description: Prevents Glean from sending any telemetry pings

Crash Reporting.description: Disable crash uploads and suppress crash-report prompts

browser.crashReports.crashPull.title: Disable remote crash report requests
browser.crashReports.crashPull.description: Prevents remote settings from requesting background-process crash reports

browser.crashReports.requestedNeverShowA.title: Never prompt for background crash reports

toolkit.crashreporter.include_context_he.title: Exclude heap context from crash reports

Block Implicit Outbound.description: Control background or automatic network activity that was not explicitly user-initiated

network.http.speculative-parallel-limit.title: Disable speculative connections on link hover

network.preconnect.title: Disable automatic connections to third-party domains

network.early-hints.enabled.title: Disable Early Hints
network.early-hints.enabled.description: Prevents servers from sending early responses before the main response

network.early-hints.preconnect.enabled.title: Disable Early Hints preconnect
network.early-hints.preconnect.enabled.description: Prevents Early Hints from triggering preconnect operations

network.http.basic_http_auth.enabled.title: Disable Basic HTTP authentication
network.http.basic_http_auth.enabled.description: Basic auth sends credentials in plaintext; only use with HTTPS

network.http.network_error_logging.enabl.title: Disable Network Error Logging (NEL)
network.http.network_error_logging.enabl.description: NEL is used for analytics by design and can be used for fingerprinting

security.csp.reporting.enabled.title: Disable CSP reporting
security.csp.reporting.enabled.description: Prevents CSP violation reports from being sent to third-party servers

DNS.description: Harden DNS resolution and reduce proxy bypass risks

network.dns.native_https_query.title: Enable native HTTPS DNS record lookups
network.dns.native_https_query.description: Allows HTTPS DNS resource-record queries used during connection setup; separate from DNS over HTTPS

network.proxy.socks_remote_dns.title: Resolve DNS remotely when using SOCKS
network.proxy.socks_remote_dns.description: For example with Tor, this keeps your local DNS resolver from seeing the destination hostname

network.file.disable_unc_paths.title: Disable using UNC (Uniform Naming Convention) paths
network.file.disable_unc_paths.description: Warning: Can break extensions for profiles on network shares

network.gio.supported-protocols.title: Disable GIO as a potential proxy bypass vector

network.dns.localDomains.title: Resolve tracking domains to localhost
network.dns.localDomains.description: Redirects known telemetry, analytics, and ad domains to localhost to prevent connections

network.proxy.type.title: Bypass system proxy configuration
network.proxy.type.description: Lets WebLibre control proxying instead of inheriting Android's system proxy settings

network.ohttp.configURL.title: Disable OHTTP config URL
network.ohttp.configURL.description: Prevents fetching Oblivious HTTP configuration for telemetry

network.ohttp.relayURL.title: Disable OHTTP relay URL
network.ohttp.relayURL.description: Prevents using Oblivious HTTP relay for telemetry

network.android_doh.autoselect_enabled.title: Disable Android DoH autoselect
network.android_doh.autoselect_enabled.description: Prevents Android from automatically selecting a DoH provider

Certificate Revocation.description: Use CRLite instead of OCSP for certificate revocation checks

security.OCSP.enabled.title: Disable OCSP fetches
security.OCSP.enabled.description: CRLite provides faster and more private certificate revocation checking than OCSP

security.pki.certificate_transparency.mo.title: Enforce Certificate Transparency (CT)
security.pki.certificate_transparency.mo.description: Rejects publicly trusted certificates that violate CT policy

security.certerrors.mitm.auto_enable_ent.title: Disable auto-enabling enterprise root certificates
security.certerrors.mitm.auto_enable_ent.description: Prevents Firefox from automatically trusting system-installed root certificates

Secure Connections.description: Harden TLS, certificate validation, and HTTPS upgrade behavior

security.ssl.require_safe_negotiation.title: Require safe negotiation
security.ssl.require_safe_negotiation.description: Blocks connections to servers that don't support RFC 5746 as they're potentially vulnerable to a MiTM attack.

security.tls.enable_0rtt_data.title: Disable TLS1.3 0-RTT (round-trip time)
security.tls.enable_0rtt_data.description: This data is not forward secret, as it is encrypted solely under keys derived using the offered PSK. There are no guarantees of non-replay between connections.

security.ssl.treat_unsafe_negotiation_as.title: Display warning on the padlock for 'broken security'

security.mixed_content.upgrade_display_c.title: Upgrade mixed display content to HTTPS
security.mixed_content.upgrade_display_c.description: Automatically upgrades insecure HTTP content to HTTPS when possible

network.http.http3.enable_0rtt.title: Disable HTTP/3 0-RTT
network.http.http3.enable_0rtt.description: 0-RTT data is not forward secret as it is encrypted solely under keys derived using the offered PSK. There are no guarantees of non-replay between connections.

security.ssl.disable_session_identifiers.title: Disable TLS session identifiers
security.ssl.disable_session_identifiers.description: Prevents TLS session resumption from session tickets for tracking purposes

Privacy.description: Reduce cross-site leakage and strengthen built-in tracking protections

network.http.referer.XOriginPolicy.title: Only send cross-origin referer if host matches

network.http.referer.XOriginTrimmingPoli.title: Trim cross-origin referrers
network.http.referer.XOriginTrimmingPoli.description: Trims down referrers to just the scheme, hostname and port

network.http.referer.disallowCrossSiteRe.title: Enforce strict referrer policy on top-level navigation

general.useragent.updates.enabled.title: Disable User-Agent string updates
general.useragent.updates.enabled.description: Prevents the browser from automatically updating its User-Agent identifier

dom.private-attribution.submission.enabl.title: Disable Privacy-Preserving Attribution
dom.private-attribution.submission.enabl.description: Mozilla's ad measurement API that allows privacy-preserving conversion tracking

network.cookie.maxageCap.title: Limit maximum cookie lifetime to 180 days

dom.storage_access.auto_grants.title: Disable automatic storage access grants
dom.storage_access.auto_grants.description: Prevents websites from automatically gaining storage access through heuristics

Resist Fingerprinting.description: Enable stronger anti-fingerprinting defenses. Some sites may break, especially without the Privacy protections above.

privacy.fingerprintingProtection.pbmode.title: Enable fingerprinting protection in Private Browsing

privacy.partition.network_state.ocsp_cac.title: Partition the OCSP cache in Private Browsing

gfx.bundled-fonts.activate.title: Prefer bundled fonts over system fonts

privacy.resistFingerprinting.randomizati.title: Reset fingerprinting randomization key daily
privacy.resistFingerprinting.randomizati.description: Resets the fingerprinting randomization key daily in addition to per-session

privacy.resistFingerprinting.randomizati.title: Reset fingerprinting randomization key daily in Private Browsing

media.devices.enumerate.legacy.enabled.title: Disable legacy media device enumeration
media.devices.enumerate.legacy.enabled.description: Prevents enumeration of media devices which can be used for fingerprinting

WebGL.description: Keep WebGL available while spoofing identifying renderer details where possible

webgl.sanitize-unmasked-renderer.title: Disable built-in WebGL renderer sanitization
webgl.sanitize-unmasked-renderer.description: The fixed vendor and renderer strings above are used instead

webgl.disable-fail-if-major-performance-.title: Ignore major-performance-caveat blocking
webgl.disable-fail-if-major-performance-.description: Avoids disabling WebGL on devices Gecko marks as slow or unstable

WebRTC.description: Keep WebRTC available with IP-leak mitigations and stricter routing behavior

media.peerconnection.enabled.title: Enable WebRTC
media.peerconnection.enabled.description: Required for voice calls, video calls, and similar realtime features

media.peerconnection.ice.default_address.title: Limit ICE candidates to the default route

media.peerconnection.ice.proxy_only_if_b.title: Prefer proxy-compatible ICE when a proxy is set

media.peerconnection.mtransport_process.title: Isolate WebRTC media transport in separate process

media.peerconnection.ice.relay_only.title: Relay-only mode (no direct P2P)
media.peerconnection.ice.relay_only.description: Routes all traffic through relay servers, breaks direct peer-to-peer

Attack Surface Reduction.description: Reduce attack surface by disabling potentially dangerous features

pdfjs.enableXfa.title: Disable PDF.js XFA forms
pdfjs.enableXfa.description: XFA forms in PDFs can execute code and have been vectors for exploits

mathml.disabled.title: Disable MathML (Mathematical Markup Language)
mathml.disabled.description: MathML has been a source of browser exploits with limited legitimate use

gfx.font_rendering.graphite.enabled.title: Disable Graphite font rendering
gfx.font_rendering.graphite.enabled.description: Graphite font rendering has had multiple security vulnerabilities

javascript.options.ion.title: Disable IonMonkey JIT compiler
javascript.options.ion.description: Severe performance impact - disables JS optimization

javascript.options.baselinejit.title: Disable Baseline JIT compiler
javascript.options.baselinejit.description: Severe performance impact - disables JS optimization

accessibility.force_disabled.title: Disable accessibility service integration
accessibility.force_disabled.description: Prevents other apps from accessing browser content via accessibility APIs, reducing attack surface

javascript.options.wasm_optimizingjit.title: Disable WebAssembly optimizing JIT
javascript.options.wasm_optimizingjit.description: Disables WASM-Ion (BaldrMonkey) JIT while keeping WebAssembly functional

javascript.options.native_regexp.title: Disable native regexp JIT
javascript.options.native_regexp.description: Disables irregexp JIT for regex evaluation, reducing attack surface from regex exploits

javascript.options.jithints.title: Disable JIT hints optimization
javascript.options.jithints.description: Disables eager baseline hints to reduce JIT attack surface

javascript.options.main_process_disable_.title: Disable all JITs for parent process
javascript.options.main_process_disable_.description: Disables JIT compilation for the critical parent/main process

Extension Security.description: Control extension behavior and prevent fingerprinting via extensions

extensions.getAddons.cache.enabled.title: Disable add-on metadata cache updates
extensions.getAddons.cache.enabled.description: Reduces background refreshes of extension metadata

privacy.resistFingerprinting.block_mozAd.title: Block mozAddonManager exposure
privacy.resistFingerprinting.block_mozAd.description: Prevents websites from querying installed add-ons through this legacy API

extensions.userContextIsolation.enabled.title: Enable container isolation for extensions
extensions.userContextIsolation.enabled.description: Allows extensions to be isolated per container, enabling per-container extension control

Geolocation.description: Configure geolocation and region services to protect privacy

geo.provider.network.url.title: Use BeaconDB for network geolocation
geo.provider.network.url.description: Replaces Google's geolocation service with the privacy-respecting BeaconDB

browser.region.network.url.title: Disable Mozilla GeoIP/Region Service
browser.region.network.url.description: Prevents Firefox from monitoring the user's region/general location

dom.battery.enabled.title: Disable Battery API
dom.battery.enabled.description: The Battery Status API can be used to fingerprint devices

Disk Avoidance.description: Control what data to persist to disk

browser.cache.disk.enable.title: Disable disk cache
browser.cache.disk.enable.description: Don't cache data to disk. Might impact performance negatively

browser.privatebrowsing.forceMediaMemory.title: Keep media cache in memory for Private Browsing

media.memory_cache_max_size.title: Increase the in-memory media cache size

browser.sessionstore.privacy_level.title: Disable storing extra session data
browser.sessionstore.privacy_level.description: Extra session data such as form content, cookies and POST data

PDFJS.description: Control built-in PDF viewer behavior and document restrictions

pdfjs.enablePermissions.title: Never allow documents to prevent copying text

pdfjs.externalLinkTarget.title: Open PDF links in new tabs

pdfjs.sidebarViewOnLoad.title: Show sidebar by default when viewing PDFs

permissions.manager.defaultsUrl.title: Remove default special permissions for Mozilla domains

network.IDN_show_punycode.title: Use Punycode in Internationalized Domain Names to eliminate possible spoofing
network.IDN_show_punycode.description: Prevents domain spoofing attacks using lookalike Unicode characters (e.g. xn--pypal-4ve.com vs paypal.com)

media.autoplay.default.title: Block media autoplay by default
media.autoplay.default.description: Blocks both audio and video autoplay
